MonkFist.name: ITEM_MONKFIST_NAME
MonkFist.desc_resolved:
You can use your basic attack an extra time each turn.
Innate

MonkStyleChanger.name: ITEM_STANCESWITCHER_NAME
MonkStyleChanger.desc_resolved:
Use: Switch between melee and ranged stances.
You have Brace 1 while in melee stance.
Innate

ButcherHook.name: ITEM_MEATHOOK_NAME
ButcherHook.desc_resolved:
Use: Pull a unit toward you.
Innate

ButcherHook_Temporary.name: ITEM_MEATHOOK_NAME
ButcherHook_Temporary.desc_resolved: Use: Pull a unit toward you.

Necro_SoulDagger_Uncharged.name: ITEM_SOULDAGGER_NAME
Necro_SoulDagger_Uncharged.desc_resolved:
Use: A melee attack. If this weapon damages an allied cat, gain one of their spells at random in your bonus ability slot.
If this weapon downs an ally it becomes Charged for the rest of the battle.

Necro_SoulDagger_Charged.name: ITEM_SOULDAGGERCHARGED_NAME
Necro_SoulDagger_Charged.desc_resolved:
Use: A melee attack with Lifesteal. If this weapon damages an allied cat, gain one of their spells at random in your bonus ability slot.
Loses its charge at the end of the battle.

SleepDart.name: ITEM_SLEEPDART_NAME
SleepDart.desc_resolved: Use: A straight ranged attack that inflicts Sleep 1.

SleepDart2.name: ITEM_SLEEPDART_NAME
SleepDart2.desc_resolved: Use: A straight ranged attack that inflicts Sleep 1.
